examples: Inherited erythromelalgia is a disease of small nerves and blood vessels that causes severe pain in response to heat, pressure, exertion or stress.
Objective To study the mechanism, clinical manifestations and pathophysiological characteristics of erythromelalgia accompanying polycythemia vera.
We are excited by the promise XEN402 has shown in early proof-of-concept trials and are committed to its development as a novel therapy for the treatment of pain associated with erythromelalgia "."
